- What changed?

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build:sdk`
- [ ] `npm run build:connect`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build:server`
- [ ] `npm run build:ui`
- [ ] `npm test -- --run`
- [ ] Targeted Playwright or manual smoke test when UI behavior changed
